title.en: It can be said that such an opportunity can onl...

content.en:
"Originally, I thought it would take a long time to collect so many Soul Splitting Red Crystals, and even some difficulties, but it turned out to be so easy to collect!"

Ye Tian felt that there were too many resources to cut off the forbidden area at this moment, and they were also extremely precious.

However, this is also the reason why those Ninefold Origin Ancestors did not dare to enter to cut off the forbidden area, and he copied the Soul Splitting Red Crystal, so that he could obtain so many Soul Splitting Red Crystals.

Otherwise, even if he was a Ninefold Ancestor, he wouldn't want to snatch so many Soul Splitting Red Crystals.

It can be said that such an opportunity can only be easily obtained by him.

"It's time to impact the realm of immeasurable will!"

Ye Tian decided.

......

Truncate the Yellow Building.

Ye Tian was in retreat here, and he placed a large amount of Soul Splitting Red Crystal around, and then began to absorb the energy of Soul Splitting Red Crystal.

Rumble!!!!

A massive amount of Soul Splitting Red Crystal energy poured into Ye Tian's will, refining Ye Tian's will at an incredible speed, refining and improving his will again and again.

However, in a short period of time, Ye Tian's will still did not improve, at least the quantity did not improve in the slightest, but the quality improved a little bit.

And it is precisely this qualitative improvement that will eventually make his will step into the level of immeasurable will.

As the years passed, with the consumption of a large amount of Soul Splitting Red Crystal, Ye Tian's will was gradually about to cross that shackle.

The long years passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's will finally reached a certain critical point, and under the effect of the massive Soul Splitting Red Crystal, he completely broke that shackle.

Moreover, Ye Tian's will violently sucked the massive Soul Splitting Red Crystals, absorbing these Soul Splitting Red Crystals in an instant.

Click!

The shackles in the dark have finally been completely broken.

At this moment, Ye Tian's will was transforming into an immeasurable will!!

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying immeasurable will even broke through the formation that cut off the Yellow Mansion and spread to the outside world, causing a shock that cut off an area of Black Mountain.

Truncate the depths of the Yellow Building.

Shi Chao Dao Ancestor opened his eyes and looked at Ye Tian's location with some surprise.

"This is the retreat place of that little guy of the Endless Dao Ancestor, he has condensed an immeasurable will!"

Shi Chao Dao Ancestor was extremely shocked.

He admitted that Ye Tian was very wicked and his understanding was terrifying.

After all, it was not long after becoming the Eightfold Origin Ancestor that he had comprehended the rudiments of the Immeasurable Dao, and this was not just a matter of chance, but his own comprehension must be the key.

But the condensation of immeasurable will has nothing to do with understanding!

At present, on the Silent Black Sea, there is only one way to condense the immeasurable will, and that is to use a large number of resources to continuously improve the immeasurable will, and only with the massive resources can the will be expected to raise the will to the realm of the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor!

In fact, many Dao Ancestors, even the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building, couldn't raise their will to immeasurable will before entering the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor, mainly because they didn't have so many resources to enhance their will.

Only when they are promoted to the Ninefold Ancestor, at that moment, will the will metamorphose into an immeasurable will.

Of course, it is more difficult to become a Ninefold Origin Ancestor than to condense an immeasurable will, and even if there is a demon who can condense the Infinite Will of the Eightfold Ancestor, it may not be able to be promoted to the Ninefold Ancestor.

Becoming a Ninefold Ancestor requires qualifications, and condensing an immeasurable will only requires resources.

"Where did the Endless Dao Ancestor get so many resources, and even if he was given a large amount of resources, his ascension speed would be too fast!"

Shi Chao Dao Ancestor was extremely curious.

He even wanted to know where Ye Tian got so many resources, but when he thought about it carefully, Ye Tian had already condensed an immeasurable will, even if he wanted to spy on Ye Tian, he would be aware of it.

Thinking like this, he still didn't make any plans to spy on Ye Tian.

......

"Finally condensed the immeasurable will, when I comprehend the true immeasurable will, combined with the immeasurable will, I can turn into the immeasurable dao domain, in that case, my strength will reach an incredible improvement, and when the time comes, it will even be comparable to the half-step ninefold ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After condensing the immeasurable will, Ye Tian found that the Soul Splitting Red Crystal was almost useless to him.

Obviously, this Soul Splitting Red Crystal is also useful for the will of the immeasurable will.

Although he didn't need the Soul Splitting Red Crystal anymore, this kind of resource was absolutely extremely precious, and any Ninefold Ancestor would collect it in large quantities if he encountered it.

You don't need it, but you can use it for your relatives or subordinates, or you can sell it or exchange it for other precious resources.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian was still continuing to collect the Soul Splitting Red Crystal, and the collected Soul Splitting Red Crystal was all stored.

After condensing his immeasurable will, Ye Tian found that he was no longer afraid of the soul-splitting red light that spread from the cracks of the red peaks.

So, he could stay in the red light of Soul Breaker forever.

In the following days, a replica body of Ye Tian had been practicing near the red peak, comprehending the rudiments of the Immeasurable Dao.

And the body of the Soul Splitting Red Beast was still looking for resources in the Soul Splitting Red Light area in the Forbidden Zone.

Before you know it, tens of billions of years have passed.

"The red mountain peak doesn't have much effect on me, and if I continue to meditate here, it will be difficult to raise the Infinite Dao Prototype, and it is almost impossible to raise the Infinite Dao Prototype to the Dacheng realm by relying here!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he asked again, and there were still no places in the treasures of the Nine Floors.

But.

Just when Ye Tian felt that he had no hope of going to those few treasure lands, the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor found Ye Tian.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, do you want to comprehend the Infinite Dao with the help of those treasures of the Nine Folds Building?" asked Shi Chao Dao Ancestor.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

At this time, Shi Chao Dao Ancestor smiled and said, "If it is an ordinary eightfold origin ancestor application, it will definitely be no play, and even a half-step ninefold origin ancestor will be useless to apply." But if you were able to comprehend the rudiments of the Immeasurable Dao at the early stage of the Eightfold Ancestor, and condensed the immeasurable will, I can give you a quota, which is the quota for entering the Evergreen Mountain. Of course, although this quota is given to you, you still have to give the points you should give, otherwise I can't explain it to other high-level executives. "

"Thank you Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to make up points.

He wants to practice and comprehend in Changbai Mountain for a long time, but he can't do it without enough points, if the points are not much, he will have to come out, and the quota will be gone!

In the following days, Ye Tian began to frantically take tasks to collect points.

Fortunately, his strength was strong enough, so the speed of collecting points would be much faster than that of the other Yae Ancestors.

He was not in a hurry, after all, the quota given to him by the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor had been retained, and he could go to Changbai Mountain at any time.
